documents.text:
[接口] POST /api/v1/auth/login - 用户手机号登录
描述: 用户通过手机号和验证码登录系统，返回 JWT token

[响应结构] POST /api/v1/auth/login
{"content_type": "application/json", "schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"token": {"type": "string", "description": "JWT访问令牌"}, "user_id": {"type": "integer", "description": "用户ID"}, "expires_in": {"type": "integer", "description": "过期时间(秒)"}}}}

[接口] POST /api/v1/device/create - 创建设备
描述: 创建新的智能健身设备，需要登录token

[响应结构] POST /api/v1/device/create
{"content_type": "application/json", "schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"device_id": {"type": "integer", "description": "新建设备ID"}, "device_name": {"type": "string"}, "status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["active", "inactive"]}, "created_at": {"type": "string", "format": "date-time"}}}}

[接口] GET /api/v1/device/list - 查询设备列表
描述: 分页查询设备列表，支持按类型和状态筛选

[响应结构] GET /api/v1/device/list
{"content_type": "application/json", "schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"total": {"type": "integer", "description": "总条数"}, "page": {"type": "integer"}, "items": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "object", "properties": {"device_id": {"type": "integer"}, "device_name": {"type": "string"}, "device_type": {"type": "string"}, "sn": {"type": "string"}, "status": {"type": "string"}, "created_at": {"type": "string"}}}}}}}

[接口] GET /api/v1/device/{device_id} - 查询设备详情
描述: 根据设备ID查询单个设备的详细信息

[请求参数] GET /api/v1/device/{device_id}
Headers: {"Authorization": "Bearer {{token}}"}

[响应结构] GET /api/v1/device/{device_id}
{"content_type": "application/json", "schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"device_id": {"type": "integer"}, "device_name": {"type": "string"}, "device_type": {"type": "string"}, "sn": {"type": "string"}, "description": {"type": "string"}, "price": {"type": "number"}, "status": {"type": "string"}, "owner_id": {"type": "integer"}, "created_at": {"type": "string"}, "updated_at": {"type": "string"}}}}

[接口] PUT /api/v1/device/{device_id} - 更新设备信息
描述: 更新指定设备的名称、描述或状态

[响应结构] PUT /api/v1/device/{device_id}
{"content_type": "application/json", "schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"device_id": {"type": "integer"}, "device_name": {"type": "string"}, "status": {"type": "string"}, "updated_at": {"type": "string"}}}}

[接口] DELETE /api/v1/device/{device_id} - 删除设备
描述: 删除指定设备（软删除，标记为已删除状态）

[请求参数] DELETE /api/v1/device/{device_id}
Headers: {"Authorization": "Bearer {{token}}"}

[响应结构] DELETE /api/v1/device/{device_id}
{"content_type": "application/json", "schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"message": {"type": "string", "description": "操作结果"}, "device_id": {"type": "integer"}}}}
